JHIN-WHISPER.title: Whisper
JHIN-WHISPER.description: At the start of each combat, gain 4 [gold]Bullets[/gold]. When [gold]Flourish[/gold] triggers, increase this attack's damage by {flourishMultiplierPercent}%. If the target's HP is below {lowHpThresholdPercent}%, deal {lowHpBonusDamage} additional damage.
JHIN-WHISPER.flavor: Every pull of the trigger is a pursuit of perfection.
JHIN-JHIN_MASK.title: Jhin's Mask
JHIN-JHIN_MASK.description: At the start of each combat, apply {markAmount} [gold]Mark[/gold] to all enemies.
JHIN-JHIN_MASK.flavor: Behind the mask is not concealment, but an entrance.
JHIN-EMPTY_SHELL.title: Empty Shell
JHIN-EMPTY_SHELL.description: Whenever your [gold]Bullets[/gold] truly become 0, gain {blockAmount} Block.
JHIN-EMPTY_SHELL.flavor: Only after the last shot leaves the chamber does the dance begin.
JHIN-LAST_WHISPER.title: Last Whisper
JHIN-LAST_WHISPER.description: When [gold]Flourish[/gold] triggers, increase this attack's damage by {flourishMultiplierPercent}%. If the target's HP is below {lowHpThresholdPercent}%, deal {lowHpBonusDamage} additional damage.
JHIN-LAST_WHISPER.flavor: When four shots fall silent, the final whisper begins... one last crescendo.
JHIN-FOURTH_BULLET.title: Fourth Bullet
JHIN-FOURTH_BULLET.description: The first [gold]Flourish[/gold] each combat deals double damage.
JHIN-FOURTH_BULLET.flavor: The fourth is never just a number... it is a signature.
JHIN-FINE_GUN_OIL.title: Fine Gun Oil
JHIN-FINE_GUN_OIL.description: After you reload, your next [gold]Shoot[/gold] deals 4 additional damage.
JHIN-FINE_GUN_OIL.flavor: A well-oiled whisper travels faster than the wind.
JHIN-LOTUS_DEVICE.title: Lotus Device
JHIN-LOTUS_DEVICE.description: At the start of each combat, apply 2 [gold]Lotus Trap[/gold] to a random enemy.
JHIN-LOTUS_DEVICE.flavor: Beauty blooms where it is least expected.
JHIN-SHOW_TICKET.title: Show Ticket
JHIN-SHOW_TICKET.description: When you kill an enemy that has [gold]Mark[/gold], gain 6 Gold.
JHIN-SHOW_TICKET.flavor: A sold-out show pays in more than applause.
JHIN-ACT_FOUR_SCRIPT.title: Act Four Script
JHIN-ACT_FOUR_SCRIPT.description: The first [gold]Flourish[/gold] each turn: draw 1 card and gain 1 Energy.
JHIN-ACT_FOUR_SCRIPT.flavor: Every masterpiece has a final act waiting in the wings.
JHIN-PERFECT_STAGE.title: Perfect Stage
JHIN-PERFECT_STAGE.description: If you play exactly 4 cards in a turn, gain 12 Block at the end of turn.
JHIN-PERFECT_STAGE.flavor: Precision is not perfection. Perfection is precision... four times over.
